title: JavaScript Essentials
description: Variables, functions, arrays, objects, async basics.

lessons.title: let and const
lessons.subtitle: Modern variable declaration
lessons.starterCode: // TODO: declare const PI = 3.14 and log it
lessons.task: Declare a constant PI with value 3.14 and log it.

lessons.title: Arrays
lessons.subtitle: Push, map, reduce
lessons.starterCode:
const nums = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];
// TODO: log the sum
lessons.task: Print the sum of the nums array.

lessons.title: Functions
lessons.subtitle: Arrow functions and parameters
lessons.starterCode:
// TODO: define square = (n) => n * n

console.log(square(8));
lessons.task: Define an arrow function square that returns n*n. The program should print 64.

lessons.title: Objects
lessons.subtitle: Key-value pairs
lessons.starterCode:
const user = { name: "Alex", level: 7 };
// TODO: print 'Alex - Level 7'
lessons.task: Print 'Alex - Level 7' using the user object's properties.
